zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry於1554年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛哈時，她的父親Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry40歲，母親Marjory Mackenzie16歲。她於1572年與John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪蓋爾洛享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry was born in 1554, in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry, was 40 and her mother, Marjory Mackenzie, was 16. She married John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch in 1572, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1594, in Gairloch, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry est née en 1554, à Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Marjory Mackenzie, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch en 1572, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1594, à Gairloch, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ko.Gairloch, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 게어럭

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry(이)가 1554년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 럭압어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory Mackenzie(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1572년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 게어럭에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry nasceu em 1554, em Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Mackenzie, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch em 1572, em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1594, em Gairloch, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry родилась в 1554 г. в местности лочабир, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory Mackenzie, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch в 1572 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1594 г. в местности геирлоч, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry nació en 1554, en Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Angus Macalister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Marjory Mackenzie, tenía 16 años. Se casó con John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch en 1572, en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1594, en Gairloch, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
